action.reasoning: Observation: The 0.65/0.35 ensemble improved mean_r2 to 0.4987, while 0.75/0.25 scored 0.4981 and the individual models were lower. Analysis: The improvement trend suggests the optimal weight likely gives slightly more weight to the resume model than 0.35; a simple quadratic interpolation from available scores suggests around 0.45 resume weight. Decision: Create and evaluate a 0.55/0.45 ensemble checkpoint with the same prediction pipeline and clamp metadata.
action.command: python make_ensemble.py --out checkpoints/ensemble_55_45.pt --wa 0.55 --wb 0.45 && python predict.py --data_path tmp_smoke --checkpoint checkpoints/ensemble_55_45.pt --output tmp_smoke2/out.json
